name: almi-celpip
description: AlmiCELPIP — AI-powered CELPIP (Canadian English Language Proficiency Index Program) practice in the AlmiWorld family. Four skills scored per-skill on the Canadian Language Benchmark (CLB 1–12), no composite; CELPIP-General (all 4 skills) and CELPIP-General LS (Listening + Speaking). Separate product (almicelpip.almiworld.com). Original content — never copied from CELPIP/Paragon. Practice estimates only; confirm the CLB you need with IRCC.

scripts.build: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && next build && npm run seed:prod
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:listening && npm run seed:reading && npm run seed:writing && npm run seed:speaking
